title: クライマックス1戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've finally made it to the battlefield that will
determine the greatest Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Palpable! Hearing these cheers makes it
exceptionally clear that cooperating in this race
series was absolutely necessary!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your partner has already made her way to the
track, I see! I hoped to wish her luck, but it
appears I was a step too slow!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'm here to cheer on all the
Umamusume participating today!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Come victory or defeat—this will be the ultimate
climax! Now, it's time to race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the first race in the series, and the first
step towards the title of "greatest"!
